mnemonics.title: Waterfall Phases
mnemonics.content: SRSDDT: System Requirements, Software Requirements, Design, Development, Testing

mnemonics.title: Agile Values
mnemonics.content: CCOD: Customer Collaboration Over Contract Negotiation, Responding to Change Over Documentation

acronyms.usage: Informal term for sprint planning meetings

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a mountain slope decreasing left-to-right showing remaining work
Visualize circular flowchart with Plan → Implement → Review → Retrospect phases

analogies.analogy: Like constructing a building - foundation must be set before walls
Grocery shopping list prioritized by meal importance
